scripts.build: npm -w @hna/shared run build && npm -w @hna/api run build && npm -w @hna/web run build
scripts.test: npm -w @hna/shared run test && npm -w @hna/api run test && npm -w @hna/web run test
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @hna/shared run typecheck && npm -w @hna/api run typecheck && npm -w @hna/web run typecheck
